security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Local EPUB to audiobook studio powered by Kokoro
bundle.longDescription: Generate, read, and export synchronized audiobooks locally from DRM-free EPUB files.
